interaction_phrase: Head of Technical Partnerships at Diraq
occurrence_sentence: Arne Laucht is the Head of Technical Partnerships at Diraq and a Scientia A/ Professor for Quantum Engineering in the School of Electrical Engineering & Telecommunications at UNSW Sydney.
